title: SUPPORT GROUPS - 211info
text: MID-WILLAMETTE TRANSGENDER SUPPORT NETWORK SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers various support groups for different genders and questioning communities. Meetings occur virtually over Zoom at designated dates found on our link tree. 260 SW Madison Avenue Suite 110 Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Individuals who are transgender, non-binary, intersex, genderqueer, gender non-conforming, or intersex Hours: Varies by support group Email (541) 264-1973 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 264-1973 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Complete form on link tree to register FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Complete form on link tree AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday noon-5pm. By appointment only for any other days. Services: LGBTQ2+ Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: DRUG RELATED HARM REDUCTION PROGRAMS - HARM REDUCTION/INJECTION SUPPLY PROGRAM FOOD - FOOD PANTRY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CASE MANAGEMENT AND RESOURCE DISPATCHING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MID-WILLAMETTE TRANSGENDER SUPPORT NETWORK
